title: cerastium hirtellum var. brevicorollinum
intro: Cerastium hirtellum var. brevicorollinum, also known as the hairy mouse-ear chickweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cerastium hirtellum var. brevicorollinum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
